commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed because the open PR already contains the focused Discord code/test fix; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review and validation.; Cleared: The diff only changes Discord callback gating and a regression assertion; it does not add dependencies, workflow changes, secret handling, or new code execution paths. commands.review_summary:
The PR guards Discord `onPartialReply` registration so progress-mode draft streams keep progress callbacks without advertising text preview streaming, and adds a regression assertion for the default progress path.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main registers `onPartialReply` for Discord progress-mode draft streams, and the shared runner uses that callback as final-reply dedupe evidence. I did not execute the harness in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the open PR already contains the focused Discord code/test fix; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review and validation.
